frictions.description: scored_samples.json nests sample data (including engagement/creator/media) inside a 'sample' key rather than as top-level fields. The assertion says 'includes engagement, creator, and media data as structured objects alongside scoring results' — this is satisfied because the sample object with all three fields sits alongside bucket_scores, weighted_score, confidence, and classification at the top level.
frictions.resolution: Inspected the nested 'sample' object and confirmed engagement/creator/media are structured dicts within it.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. normalized_samples.json has engagement, creator, and media as top-level structured dicts. scored_samples.json has them as structured dicts inside the 'sample' nested object alongside scoring results (bucket_scores, weighted_score, confidence, classification).
